info.name: E-Commerce API
info.description:
E-Commerce API Documentation

Base URL: http://localhost:8000/api

Authentication: Bearer Token (JWT)

Last Updated: 2026-03-01

request.description: Send OTP to mobile via Muthobarta SMS gateway
Verify OTP and register new user
Verify OTP and login existing user
Check if current JWT token is valid
Check stock availability for a product/variant
Get current price for a product
Get public reviews for a product
Update stock for a specific variant
Get stock history for a variant
Search products for POS. Returns regular price and auto-calculated wholesale_price.
Find product by barcode or SKU for POS scanning.
Create a wholesale POS order. wholesale_price is auto-calculated from wholesale_percentage.
Hold current cart for later retrieval.
List all held carts for current user.
Get printable receipt for a POS order.
Get tracking timeline for a POS order.
Update delivery status for a POS order.
